demo.title: Deploy and fund a USDG achievement prize pool on Robinhood Chain
demo.code:
deploy the prize pool on Robinhood, fund it with USDG, then claim a reward for NFT #42

-> 1. Deploy PrizePool(usdgAddress, adminAddress)
   2. Approve USDG to pool, call fund(amount) — USDG enters, can never be admin-withdrawn
   3. Admin calls addAchievement(id, rewardType, amountOrBps, eligMode, ...)
   4. Anyone calls claim(achievementId, collection, tokenId) — USDG goes to NFT owner

setup: Requires the Bankr skill with an API key configured and wallet funded on Robinhood Chain (chain 4663)
Deploy PrizePool with prizeToken=USDG and your admin address (see references/deploy-data.md)
Fund the pool via approve(pool, amount) on USDG then fund(amount) on the pool — no admin withdrawal ever
